description_long: This is a freestanding, rectangular shelving unit with a minimalist design, featuring three evenly spaced horizontal shelves supported by two solid vertical side panels. The structure is open at the front and back, allowing for easy access to items placed on the shelves from either side. The surfaces appear smooth and are finished in a uniform dark gray color, giving the unit a modern, utilitarian look suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. The shelves are flat and sturdy, capable of supporting various objects like books, tools, or decorative items. There are no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional and straightforward construction. The overall build suggests it is made primarily of wood or engineered wood, possibly with a laminate or painted finish.
description: A modern, freestanding shelving unit with three open shelves and a dark gray, smooth finish. Its minimalist design is functional and suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and the full width of the unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid vertical panel and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, with open shelves and no backing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side panel and shelf depth.
